utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey Joey ! Aww , you remembered even though you are a big star !

emotion_cause.span: 2_you remembered even though you are a big star !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Aw , come on ! It will be years before I forget you !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , what it like on a movie set , huh ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you have a dressing room ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you have a chair with your name on it ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_Do you have a chair with your name on it ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uh , well yeah ... yeah , I have got all of that going on .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , listen uh , I want you to make sure you tell Chandler that he could not have been more wrong !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I gotta go Monica , my uh , my sushi here !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Sorry about that . Thanks for waitin .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Everybody smile ! Okay , thanks a lot ! Enjoy your stay at Caesar ! We hope it is toga ... rrific !
